name: collection_page_5_collections_all

observed_strengths.observation: 'Current Deals' section prominently placed — promotional collection featured at top of all-products view

Scent-based product sub-categories within collections (Norse Winter, Bold Fortune, Old Money, Tree Ranger, Temple Smoke) — fragrance line clearly differentiated by name/identity, aids product discovery
Witty, brand-voice meta description: 'Every single thing we sell, all on one page, like how they did it in the 90s.' — strong brand personality

missing_or_weak.observation: Collection page sections show only 3 product categories (Beard Oil, Utility Beard Balm, Utility Beard Wash) in headings — the full catalog depth (cologne, deodorant, tools, etc.) not fully surfaced in page structure
No sorting or filtering controls visible in page headings — discoverability relies on scrolling a large catalog

purchase_path_notes: All-products collection is a catch-all landing page. The fragrance scent families (Norse Winter, etc.) work well as identity hooks but require buyers to know which scent they want — first-time buyers may need a quiz or selector.
